title: Compare pre-release versions
prompt: Fix compare_versions so a pre-release version sorts before the matching final release. Preserve the comparator return convention: -1, 0, or 1.
hidden_tests_description: Equal versions, patch differences, and multiple pre-release labels are checked within the supported subset.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: The task is standard-comparison oriented and does not reward any system-specific format.
h0_risk_notes: A strong non-system baseline familiar with version rules can match this.
